lineage.Process: ExportFeatures long_routes_concentration.hexgrid C:\repositories\research\arctic_notebooks\web\SVA\7_Routes\long_routes_concentration_grid.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "hex_id "hex_id" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,long_routes_concentration.hexgrid,hex_id,-1,-1;route_len_m "route_len_m" true true false 8 Double 8 38,First,#,long_routes_concentration.hexgrid,route_len_m,-1,-1;route_km "route_km" true true false 8 Double 8 38,First,#,long_routes_concentration.hexgrid,route_km,-1,-1;route_len_pct "route_len_pct" true true false 8 Double 8 38,First,#,long_routes_concentration.hexgrid,route_len_pct,-1,-1;route_area_m2 "route_area_m2" true true false 8 Double 8 38,First,#,long_routes_concentration.hexgrid,route_area_m2,-1,-1;route_area_km2 "route_area_km2" true true false 8 Double 8 38,First,#,long_routes_concentration.hexgrid,route_area_km2,-1,-1;occ_concentration "occ_concentration" true true false 8 Double 8 38,First,#,long_routes_concentration.hexgrid,occ_concentration,-1,-1" #
